---
name: Tester feedback
about: Share usability, workflow, or product feedback from real-user testing
title: "[Feedback] "
labels: ["feedback", "needs-triage"]
---

<!--
Feedback informs the backlog; it does not by itself authorize formula, schema, or
security changes. Do NOT include secrets or private health data. See
docs/testing/real-user-testing.md and docs/testing/feedback-triage.md.
-->

**Reporter role:** <!-- coach / trainee / maintainer -->
**Environment:** <!-- local / staging / other -->
**Account type:** <!-- public demo / private test -->
**Page or flow:**

**What were you trying to do?**

**What worked well or was confusing?**

**Suggested improvement (optional):**

**Suggested severity:** <!-- usually P2 (workflow) or P3 (suggestion) -->

**Screenshots (private data removed, optional):**
